query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_itens,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN valor IS NULL OR valor = 0 THEN 1 END) as sem_valor,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN valor > 0 THEN 1 END) as com_valor,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN valor > 0 THEN valor ELSE 0 END), 2) as valor_total,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'nao_localizado' AND valor > 0 THEN valor ELSE 0 END), 2) as valor_nao_localizado,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'localizado' AND valor > 0 THEN valor ELSE 0 END), 2) as valor_localizado
FROM patrimonio_items;
